target: 8. Open-Air Bath
Phew~...
Mmm~, this is paradise~. A big bath really is great, huh.
Hey~, Hizuru-chan?
...I agree that a large bath is nice, but.
Hmmm~~...?
Why are you here too? This is the open-air bath at my accommodation, you know.
It's fine! The people at the inn told me I could come in!
You didn't answer my question...
(Well, I was surprised by that point too. I'm truly impressed by how wide Hoine's social circle is.)
(On a related note, it makes me feel the peacefulness of this island anew. Although it's a complete failure from a security standpoint.)
Your guiding should have ended at Koba Mart earlier. If you want a bath, you can just go home and take one.
Because I wanted to take a bath with you, Hizuru-chan~.
Taking a bath this big is more fun with everyone, right~?
That might be the case for you, but I prefer to be alone and lost in thought. That way, my ideas come together better.
Ideas? Like for the stories you write, Hizuru-chan?

Yeah, that's right.
So please be quiet for a bit.
Okaaaay.
Phew~...
(It was a little different from my plans, but today I went all around the island and exchanged words with various people.)
(And all of those experiences have been inputted into my brain as "information".)
(That kind of information is helpful for my writing activities, but not all of it is always useful.)
(Each piece of information has its own unique flavor)
(There are bland flavors like that Hero of Justice, and there are also rustic, delicious flavors like that unfriendly hunter.)
(Blending those various flavors together to create a new flavor--)
(That is the livelihood and the true thrill of us novelists.)
(But lately I've been doing nothing but outputting, and perhaps I've been neglecting the input of new information-- my spirit of inquiry, far too much.)
(Ah, I see…)
(In short, the situation I'm currently in was brought upon myself, I suppose.)
(To think I'd be made to realize this now.)
(I don't want to admit it, but... I probably wouldn't have come to this realization on my own.)
...I have to thank Hoine.
Did you say something?
It's nothing. You just stay quiet and soak.
Okaaaay.
Your smartphone is ringing, you know? Aren't you going to answer it?
It's fine. It's a progress check from my editor.
Editor…?
In short, they are the person in charge of turning what I write into a book.
If that's the case, shouldn't you answer it?
Interrupting a writer's thoughts with a careless interruption is the height of incompetence as an editor.
There's no need to pay attention to them every single time. If I ignore them, they'll give up soon enough.
...See?
Hmm, I don't really get it, but--
Your face right now is a little scary, Hizuru-chan.
Scary?
Hizuru-chan, you're someone who writes all sorts of stories, right? Do you really have to make such a difficult face?
I have a lot of things I want to do, but when I think about actually being able to do them someday, I get so excited I can't help but grin, you know?
That might be true... No, I should have been like that too.
(Hoine is right...)
(A work that not even I can enjoy has no value whatsoever.)
If you're going to do it anyway, I think it's better to enjoy doing it!
Enjoy it if I'm going to do it anyway, huh.
(Come to think of it, it's been a long time... since I've felt that kind of emotion, perhaps.)
(Especially when it comes to work…)
Look, Hizuru-chan. It's clear today, so you can see the stars really well.
Yeah...
I love looking at the stars. Just spacing out and looking at them is fun.
(Was the night sky of Hitogashima really this beautiful...?)
Hehe, you have a really nice expression on your face right now, Hizuru-chan.
Do I? No...
If you say so, Hoine, then I suppose it is.
(It's a good opportunity... I won't think about anything for a while.)
(Without thinking about anything... Just vaguely feeling the flow of time...)
(Normally this would just be a waste of time, but...)
(This might actually be a very luxurious way to spend time.)
